The user has sent a cron task to check the GitHub Actions build status for jetton-monitor v0.2.0. I need to:
1. Read the task file to understand the current status
2. Check the GitHub Actions workflow status for the release
3. If build is complete, download artifacts and upload to file transfer page
4. Notify user with download link

Let me start by reading the task file and checking the GitHub Actions status.

The task file shows the status is "building" and step 1 is "in_progress". But the gh run list command returned "No runs found or repo not accessible". This could mean:
1. The repo doesn't exist or is not accessible
2. The workflow hasn't started yet
3. There might be an authentication issue

Let me try to check the repo directly and also see if there's a release already created.

content.thinking: There's a local jetton-monitor project with a GitHub workflow file at .github/workflows/windows.yml. The package.json shows version 0.1.0, but the task mentions v0.2.0. Let me check the workflow file and see if there's a remote configured for this repo.

content.text:
name: Windows Build

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, master]
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: windows-2022
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
      
      - name: Install Rust
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          Invoke-WebRequest https://win.rustup.rs/x86_64 -OutFile rustup-init.exe
          .\rustup-init.exe -y --default-toolchain stable
          $env:Path += ";$env:USERPROFILE\.cargo\bin"
          rustc --version
          cargo --version
      
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci
      
      - name: Build Tauri
        run: npm run tauri build
      
      - name: Upload MSI
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: jetton-monitor-v0.2.0-windows-msi
          path: src-tauri/target/release/bundle/msi/*.msi
      
      - name: Upload EXE
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: jetton-monitor-v0.2.0-windows-exe
          path: src-tauri/target/release/bundle/nsis/*.exe
      
      - name: Create Release
        if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v')
        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1
        with:
          files: |
            src-tauri/target/release/bundle/msi/*.msi
            src-tauri/target/release/bundle/nsis/*.exe
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

origin	git@github.com:hiyaScott/jetton-monitor.git (fetch)
origin	git@github.com:hiyaScott/jetton-monitor.git (push)
